body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This PR updates `benchmark_step` in the extension for `BenchmarkTools.jl` to work with more timestepping schemes, which should fix the error from several Buildkite jobs in CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl#4248.

## Content
- Replace hard-coded call counts for `ARS343` with a generic algorithm that works for any `IMEXAlgorithm` or `RosenbrockAlgorithm`
- Remove unnecessary configuration options and measurement results, clarify variable names, and simplify the overall logic (except the code for computing call counts, which needs to be a lot more complicated now)
- Add a short example of using `benchmark_step` to the ClimaCore tutorial in the docs, including a brief description of how to interpret the results
- Simplify the `benchmark.jl` example script that is run from `pipeline.yml`

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Generalize benchmarking extension
